mood: Warm, trustworthy, professional, appetizing, calm under pressure.

headings.usage: Friendly, clean, approachable structure. Tracking tight.

body.usage: Highly legible for dense data tables, schedules, and admin analytics.

rules: No generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].

primary.usage: Brand identity, Primary Actions, In-House Catering events on Calendar.

secondary.usage: Secondary Actions, Outside Catering events on Calendar.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous internal spacing inside containers (p-6, p-8) mixed with tight structural gaps (gap-4, gap-6) for a dense, data-rich but breathable Control Room dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements (buttons, inputs) to add physical warmth.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for surfaces, flat for data tables.
layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento 'Control Room' Grid for dashboard widgets. All pixels utilized, no jagged bottoms. h-full on children.

login_page.layout: Split screen. Left side: High-quality catering/chef image with subtle black/20 overlay. Right side: Login form container.
login_page.form: Unified Login card with 3 Tabs (User, Manager, Admin). Soft shadow, rounded-2xl. Background Bone White (#F9F8F6).

header.design: Sticky header, z-50. Solid surface (#FFFFFF) with a delicate 1px bottom border (#E5E0D8).
header.features: Includes uploaded Logo (left) and Branch Selector (right). Branch selector uses a minimalist Shadcn Select with rounded-xl.

sidebar.design: Bone White (#F9F8F6) or light stone background. Navigation links with distinct active state (bg-surface text-primary).
sidebar.widget: Smart Suggestions Weather Widget embedded at the bottom. Designed as a soft 'Neumorphic' or tactile card for visual interest without clutter.

calendar.design: Full grid-based view. Events must pop as tactile pills.
calendar.rules: 'In-House' events MUST use Primary color (Sage Green #4A5D23). 'Outside Catering' events MUST use Secondary color (Terracotta #C84B31). White text for both.

conflict_modal.design: Center-screen alert. Glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) to blur the calendar behind it.
conflict_modal.card: Sharp 1px rust red border (border-[#B33A3A]/30). High visual priority but feels structured and calm, not a chaotic error.

booking_form.design: Multi-step layout or vertical scroll with clear sub-sections. Left-aligned inputs.
booking_form.elements: Shadcn Form components. Generous touch targets for User mode (h-12 for inputs/buttons).

data_tables.design: For Menu and Staff management. Flat, cardless design. Minimal subtle borders. Row hover states (hover:bg-[#F2EFE9]) are mandatory.

analytics_dashboard.design: Dense, data-rich admin view. Use Shadcn/Recharts. Bar and Line charts styled with the Organic & Earthy palette (Sage, Terracotta, Sand, Stone).

login_hero_image.description: Chef preparing gourmet dishes. Use on the left side of the Auth screen.

booking_background.description: Outdoor buffet table. Can be used as a subtle header background or marketing hero.

placeholder_logo.description: Elegant minimalist white logo on textured background. Admin can upload over this.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2 for clear, accessible iconography.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over brand colors (Sage, Terracotta) is pure white (#FFFFFF) for WCAG AA compliance.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='branch-selector').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build strictly using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. Customize Shadcn primitives to match the rounded-xl/2xl radiuses and earthy colors.
Implement Recharts via Shadcn for Admin Analytics dashboard.
Never use generic Vercel/Stripe 'SaaS Blue' or Purple. Follow the Organic & Earthy palette exclusively.
Ensure all buttons have distinct hover states (e.g., hover:bg-[#3C4B1C]).
Execute the 'Control Room' bento grid for the dashboard view to ensure all pixels are utilized cleanly.
Center-screen double-booking conflict alert must use the glassmorphism backdrop spec.
Do not use placeholder text for logos; strictly use the provided placeholder_logo URL until admin uploads.
In User mode, ensure touch targets are large (e.g., h-12 to h-14) for unskilled staff ease of use.
